---
title: "Papers"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"     # one .qmd per paper (excludes this index)
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, description]
  filter-ui: true
---

Finished papers (PDFs). Each entry opens a page with the PDF embedded inline and
a download button.

**To add a paper:** drop the PDF in `papers/files/`, copy
`papers/_template.qmd` to `papers/your-paper.qmd`, and edit the front matter.
